description.ko: 날카로운 각도와 디지털 글리치 미학을 통해 완벽한 질서가 수학적 혼돈으로 붕괴하는 모습을 표현했습니다.
description.en: A representation of perfect order collapsing into mathematical chaos through sharp angles and digital glitch aesthetics.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian tesseract by KURO-X, titled 'Architectural Entropy.' The structure is undergoing a violent yet mathematically perfect geometric deconstruction, shattering into a vortex of sharp #808080 and #C0C0C0 polygonal shards against a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections. Intense digital glitch artifacts, pixel-sorting textures, and heavy chromatic aberration. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing precise mathematical chaos.
